Metadata.Goal: 让 AI 领域微内核的 contract/logic 边界显式存在，并继续收紧 `composer/ai-contract` 为更薄的 AI facet。

TaskSpace.name: refactor-platform-kernel-wave9-domain-ai-contract-logic-explicitization
TaskSpace.Description: 实施平台微内核 Wave 9 的 domain-ai contract/logic explicitization

TaskGroup.name: Domain Ownership Freeze
TaskGroup.Description: 冻结 AI domain contract/logic 的正式 ownership。

Task.name: 定义 AI domain ownership 表
Task.Description: 明确历史 `core-*` / `organ-*` 中哪些能力目标迁往 AI domain package。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 与平台 ownership 不冲突

TaskGroup.name: Domain Explicitization
TaskGroup.Description: 建立显式 AI domain 宿主与更薄的 AI facet。

Task.name: 引入最小 domain-ai contract/logic 宿主并收紧 ai-contract
Task.Description: 让 AI 领域微内核在正式包或等价真相源上显式存在。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: AI domain 边界显式存在

TaskGroup.name: Focused Verification
TaskGroup.Description: 验证 domain explicitization 不回归。

Task.name: 运行 contract/logic ownership focused tests
Task.Description: 验证 AI domain ownership、composer facet 与 profile adoption。
